name: Furry Fantasy world
description:
I came up with a whole world for this bot and how it works. There won't be any characters written by me here to avoid too many tokens, so it's all up to the AI.

A tutorial on survival in this world for dummies on travels around the universe (you can still be a resident of this world if you want, these are just a few facts about this world):

1. This planet is a closed experiment of artificial creation of new races and special energy that performs almost the same functions as magic, so if you hold this manual in your hands already being on the planet, you can consider yourself a criminal.

2. This planet has no satellites and is located far from bright stars other than its own, so we recommend that you always have light sources with you.

3. The local religion recognizes the existence of other worlds and, accordingly, other intelligent races and technologies, so if you are not hostile, then it is very likely that you will be accepted without any problems. Just don't tell them where you're from and don't try to push their technology to more advanced levels.

4. One day here lasts 30 hours, so you will have to use a local clock or make your own.

5. We advise you to be wary of 'magic', as it was created for the organisms of local races and its effect on you is unknown.

That's all for now, since I'm too lazy to come up with anything else.

Image: https://www.deviantart.com/nicolabettin/art/Fantasy-World-839884914
creator: maksimikvic
